criteria.name: Internal Consistency
criteria.test: Does the system avoid deriving both P and ¬P for any proposition P central to liberty?
criteria.pass_threshold: No direct contradiction in core axioms or kernel claims.

criteria.name: Finite Enumerable Axiom Set
criteria.test: Can the system be fully specified by a finite, listable set of axioms?
criteria.pass_threshold: Axiom set has definite cardinality; no open-ended or procedural axiom generation.

criteria.name: Derived Grounding of Liberty
criteria.test: Is liberty (individual property rights) a theorem derivable from foundational axioms, not merely a postulate?
criteria.pass_threshold: A derivation path exists from tier-0 axioms to a liberty theorem.

criteria.name: Property Rights Prior to State
criteria.test: Does the system recognize property rights as pre-political and non-state-derived?
criteria.pass_threshold: Property rights are not derived from democratic consent, social contract, or state grant.

criteria.name: Last-Round Problem Solution
criteria.test: Does the system contain a structural mechanism preventing terminal-period defection in finitely-repeated social games?
criteria.pass_threshold: The system provides an infinite-horizon, epistemic-uncertainty, or dominance mechanism.

criteria.name: Structural Anti-Totalitarianism
criteria.test: Does the system have a derived or axiomatic prohibition on unlimited coercive monopoly power?
criteria.pass_threshold: A theorem or axiom explicitly makes totalitarian concentration structurally impermissible.

criteria.name: Agreement-Admissibility
criteria.test: Can the system's foundational axioms be accepted by rational agents without coercion and without presupposing a particular historical or ethnic identity?
criteria.pass_threshold: The core axioms do not require acceptance of unverifiable historical claims or group membership as prerequisites.

criteria.name: Non-Coercive Accountability
criteria.test: Does the system derive a mechanism for holding agents accountable for liberty-violations that does not itself violate liberty?
criteria.pass_threshold: A theorem exists connecting accountability to non-coercive or proportional response mechanisms.

criteria.name: AI Value Alignment Criteria
criteria.test: Can the system's axioms be expressed as evaluable, formal constraints on an AI objective function?
criteria.pass_threshold: At minimum 3 formalizable constraints exist that could be implemented as an alignment specification.

criteria.name: Axiom Minimality / Parsimony
criteria.test: Is the axiom set irreducible (no axiom is derivable from the others)?
criteria.pass_threshold: No confirmed redundancy found in the axiom set.

note: PASS = criterion met. PARTIAL = criterion partially met with significant gaps. FAIL = criterion not met.
